name: Tool_RAG
description: Retrieve related tools from the toolbox based on the provided description

description.description: The description of the tool capability required.

limit.description: The number of tools to retrieve (default: 10)

test_examples.description: Find tools for BLAST sequence alignment against NCBI databases
Find tools to retrieve protein structures from PDB

name: Tool_Finder
description: Retrieve related tools from the toolbox based on the provided description using embedding-based similarity search.

description.description: The description of the tool capability required.

limit.description: The number of tools to retrieve (default: 10)

picked_tool_names.description: Pre-selected tool names to process. If provided, tool selection will skip these tools.

return_call_result.description: Whether to return both prompts and tool names. If false, returns only tool prompts.

categories.description: Optional list of tool categories to filter by

test_examples.description: Find tools for analyzing RNA-seq differential expression
Find tools to query ClinVar for variant pathogenicity

name: Tool_Finder_LLM
description: LLM-based tool finder that uses natural language processing to intelligently select relevant tools based on user queries. This tool analyzes all available tool descriptions and uses an LLM to determine which tools would be most helpful for a given task or question.

description.description: The description of the tool capability required.

limit.description: The number of tools to retrieve (default: 10)

picked_tool_names.description: Pre-selected tool names to process. If provided, tool selection will skip these tools.

return_call_result.description: Whether to return both prompts and tool names. If false, returns only tool prompts.

categories.description: Optional list of tool categories to filter by

test_examples.description: Find tools to search PubMed for articles about TP53 mutations in breast cancer
Find tools for protein structure prediction using AlphaFold

name: Tool_Finder_Keyword
description: Simple keyword-based tool finder for discovering relevant tools using text matching

description.description: The description of the tool capability required.

limit.description: The number of tools to retrieve (default: 10)

picked_tool_names.description: Pre-selected tool names to process. If provided, tool selection will skip these tools.

return_call_result.description: Whether to return both prompts and tool names. If false, returns only tool prompts.

categories.description: Optional list of tool categories to filter by

test_examples.description: Find tools for CRISPR guide RNA design
Find tools to download GEO microarray datasets
